name: Banana Nut Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mash the bananas until smooth.
2. Add sugar and mix well.
3. Stir in oil, egg, and milk until combined.
4. Sift flour and baking soda together into another bowl.
5. Mix in walnuts if using.
6. Pour the batter into lightly greased and floured oblong or small loaf pans.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 to 35 minutes.
